movies.title: Al Signor Oqdat Al Khawaja
movies.description: The story of a poor but ambitious man gets into a relationship with a daughter of a wealthy man.

movies.title: The Running Man
movies.description: A man joins a game show in which contestants, allowed to flee anywhere in the world, are pursued by "hunters" hired to kill them.

movies.title: The Naked Gun
movies.description: Following in his father's footsteps, a detective works to solve a murder case and save his police department from closure.

movies.title: Roofman
movies.description: A charismatic criminal, while on the run from the police, hides in a hidden space of a toy store. There, he adopts a new identity and becomes involved with an employee, beginning a relationship as unlikely as it is risky.

movies.title: Zootopia 2
movies.description: Brave rabbit cop Judy Hopps and her friend, the fox Nick Wilde, team up again to crack a new case, the most perilous and intricate of their careers.

movies.title: Nuremberg
movies.description: A WWII psychiatrist evaluates Nazi leaders before the Nuremberg trials, growing increasingly obsessed with understanding evil as he forms a disturbing bond with Hermann Göring.

movies.title: The Last Viking
movies.description: A bank robber released from jail must unlock his traumatised brother's memory to recover stolen loot.

movies.title: Whistle
movies.description: A misfit group of unwitting high school students stumble upon a cursed object, an ancient Aztec Death Whistle. They discover that blowing the whistle and the terrifying sound it emits will summon their future deaths to hunt them down.

movies.title: Farrey
movies.description: After gaining admission into an elite school on scholarship, an orphan genius Niyati gets entangled in a cheating racket when some of her rich friends lure her into helping them cheat in exams through elaborate methods.

movies.title: khalawees
movies.description: While child Ali Hasan plays hide-and-seek game with his grandfather, he is arrested due to the similarity of his name to the name of one of the perpetrators. When his father knows of that, he tries hard to show the truth, helped by a young female lawyer. Meanwhile, a journalist plays a strange role in trying to prove that the child is the true accused.

movies.title: Rebel
movies.description: Students who study in the town and how they are affected by the politics unfolding in the institution

movies.title: Sinners
movies.description: Ryan Coogler's supernatural epic, blending Delta Blues lore, vampire mythology, and a deeply personal tribute to his late uncle, emerged as a critical and commercial hit, becoming both the fifth highest-grossing horror film of all time and one of 2025's top domestic releases. IMDb fans definitely took notice, landing the genre-bending horror film in the IMDb MOVIEmeter's top 20 for three months. So while it was no surprise that the film garnered nominations across all the major awards shows, no one predicted it would make history as the most-nominated film in Oscars history with 16 nominations.

movies.title: Thunderbolts
movies.description: After finding themselves ensnared in a death trap, an unconventional team of antiheroes must go on a dangerous mission that will force them to confront the darkest corners of their pasts.

movies.title: Regretting You
movies.description: A mother and daughter must grapple with what's left after a devastating accident reveals a shocking betrayal and forces them to confront family secrets, redefine love, and rediscover themselves.

movies.title: Mission Impossible 8 The Final Reckoning
movies.description: Hunt and the IMF pursue a dangerous AI called the Entity that's infiltrated global intelligence. With governments and a figure from his past in pursuit, Hunt races to stop it from forever changing the world.

movies.title: Primate
movies.description: A group of friends' tropical vacation turns into a terrifying, primal tale of horror and survival.
